top_signals.title: US and Iran exchange fire as tensions rise over stalled peace talks
top_signals.summary: Centcom says Tehran launched ‘several’ ballistic missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why Richard Nixon torpedoed the global monetary system
top_signals.summary: All the gold in Fort Knox wasn’t enough to save the US dollar
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/04 - BEEDS User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Environment – Statistical Taxonomy v1.3.1 FINAL
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Deutsche Bank May Stash More Than Expected for Soured Loans
top_signals.summary: Deutsche Bank AG may set aside more money than analysts had expected for souring loans in the three months through June as it cleans up its balance sheet.

top_signals.title: Novo Nordisk rolls out Wegovy pill in the UAE — testing appetite outside the U.S. with first global launch
top_signals.summary: Novo is "all in" on launching the Wegovy pill in overseas markets, and it sees it as a "major opportunity."

top_signals.title: US may consider placing nukes in Poland, Baltic States, report says
top_signals.summary: While the discussions were ongoing, an agreement to expand U.S. nuclear hosting was not imminent, an unnamed source told the FT.

top_signals.title: Police dismantles 9 crime groups in illegal streaming crackdown
top_signals.summary: European and international law enforcement agencies have dismantled nine organized crime groups and arrested 29 suspects in a major crackdown on illegal streaming operations. [...]

top_signals.title: Critical Kirki flaw exploited to hijack WordPress admin accounts
top_signals.summary: Hackers are exploiting a critical privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2026-8206) in the Kirki plugin for WordPress to take over any user account, including those belonging to administrators. [...]
